description_long: This is an ornate chandelier with six curved arms radiating from a central stem, each arm supporting a lampshade with a semi-transparent, pleated texture. The central column is elegantly shaped, tapering at the top and bottom, and is suspended from a decorative, wrapped chain or cord. Each lampshade is adorned with small hanging crystal-like pendants, adding a touch of luxury and classic style. The overall design is symmetrical, with the arms evenly spaced and the shades forming a circular arrangement. The chandelier is predominantly a light, monochromatic color, likely white or off-white, giving it a refined and timeless appearance. The materials appear to be a combination of metal, glass or acrylic, and fabric, contributing to both structural integrity and decorative appeal.
description: A classic six-arm chandelier with pleated shades, crystal pendants, and a decorative central column, finished in a light monochrome color. The design is ornate and symmetrical, suitable for elegant interior spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six arms, pleated shades, and the central column with hanging pendants clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the curvature of the arms and the depth of the shades, with some arms partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the symmetrical arrangement of arms and shades, with the central column prominent.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, again showing the curvature of the arms and the arrangement of the shades.
